Registry / Terms / reference material (RM)

reference material (RM)

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02152 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 4 publications.

4 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2016OIML R146-1:20162.1 Tab. 1.902790
{material, sufficiently homogeneous and stable with reference to specified properties, which has been established to be fit for its intended use in measurement or in examination of nominal properties [VIM 5.13]}
pending
20102008OIML R 142:20082.4(annex 6)02121
material, sufficiently homogeneous and stable regarding one or more properties, used in calibration, in assignment of a value to another material or in quality assurance
pending
20102008OIML D 18:20082.102152
material, sufficiently homogeneous and stable with reference to specified properties, which has been established to be fit for its intended use in measurement or in examination of nominal properties
pending
202X2008OIML D 18:20082.102152
material, sufficiently homogeneous and stable with reference to specified properties, which has been established to be fit for its intended use in measurement or in examination of nominal properties [VIM:2007, 5.13]
pending
